50.reason: [This logic incorrectly builds multi-digit numbers. It assumes only two digits and overwrites `num[b]` instead of accumulating properly (e.g., "123" becomes (0+1)*10=10, then next digit handled separately but index not advanced correctly). Also, `b` is not incremented when reading digits, causing all digits to be stored in `num[0]`.]
